pr.title: Record: 11L XSA + EMA + TTT + Partial RoPE + LN Scale — val_bpb=1.1375

output.summary: 11-layer transformer pairs XSA in final layers with EMA, validation TTT, U-Net skips, partial RoPE/LN scaling, SmearGate+BigramHash, and late int6 QAT.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Test-Time Training runs 3 epochs of SGD on the validation shard before final evaluation.
techniques: Exclusive self-attention in last layers with EMA and late int6 QAT
U-Net skip connections plus partial RoPE and LN scaling for stabilized depth
SmearGate/BigramHash context tweaks plus validation TTT
